creator: dougb@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


I can't get the latest version of the port to compile with this option 
applied, sorry. If you decide to try again, please use 
${PREFIX}/bin/xscreensaver as your path. While I understand your 
point that not all of these little programs are useful standalone, 
some are, so they don't meet the definition of a program that 
should live in */libexec. 

Thanks for your interest.
